metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4510
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 9 shows the ultrastructural localization of Delphilin (A-C, arrowheads) at Purkinje cell synapses. Fig. 9A): Delphilin labelling at parallel fibre synapses. Purkinje cell spines forming synaptic contact with parallel fibre terminals (PF).
The quantitative analysis revealed a normal distribution of gold particles from presynapse to postsynapse, with a peak at 8-16 nm postsynaptic from the midline of the synaptic cleft (Fig. 9E).
The postsynaptic membrane outside the PSD was associated with very low immunogold labelling (Fig. 9F).

18/01/2021 Dnyanada: The paper provides no information on the validation/specificity of the anti-Delphilin antibody used in the study.. Experimental description: For post-embedding immunogold analysis, adult mice (2 months of age) were perfused transcardially with 4% paraformaldehyde/0.1% glutaraldehyde in 0.1 M phosphate buffer (PB), pH 7.2 (p. 805)
